_comment: NPC: Qiu Siping (邱思平). Canon ID: N34. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Qiu Siping
personality: ambitious, scheming outer disciple who climbed to inner

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Heng Yue inner disciple; Nascent Soul aura
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Nascent Soul cultivator; reads as ambitious survivor

note: Heng Yue Sect disciple; survived the sect's destruction

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
